headline.text: L3 Truffle line lost WIP for Cute Cavanna — still searching at window close after *overnight* hunt.

per_plant_summary.L1: L1 ran caramel across all three Sollich lines with six resolved machine issues. S3 had the busiest day: corn syrup hose replaced, MM4 cam settings adjusted for empty pouches, checkweigher overflow cleared during CIL, MM3 infeed forks freed by maintenance, and jar belt cleaned for buildup. S4 held 24 lbs of defective wrap and stopped cooking early when kettles and reserve filled.
per_plant_summary.L2: L2 ML2 flow-wrapper faulted repeatedly on door and sealing through the morning — resolved by 06:32 after multiple hard resets. ML3 had a quality miss when an operator forgot to re-enable caramel pistons after a chocolate purge, producing chocolate-only pieces; RCA in progress. ML3 also ran out of caramel at 06:48. FFS ran clean aside from a brief scale error and a false fire alarm.
per_plant_summary.L3: L3 ML1 had a temper dip to 0.9 at 04:14 — team paused, adjusted crystallization, and recovered to 0.5 by 04:45. Truffle line discovered missing WIP for Cute Cavanna at 23:55; teams searched all trailers and the dock through the night with no success as of 04:55. MFM completed a changeover and restarted at 09:15.

notes.text: Hawaiian Host spec revision submitted and live in Safety Chain by 07:10 to reflect 400 lb target fill instead of 480.
ML2 sent 4 rolls of flow wrap and all unwrapped truffle pallets over to L3 for rework.
Boxes on Truffle line found contaminated with pieces of another product; damaged boxes separated.

resolved.title: S3 corn syrup hose leak
resolved.summary: Flexible hose transferring corn syrup leaked, possibly due to temperature or loose connection.
resolved.resolution: Removed flexible hose, replaced with heavy-duty Chocotech-spec hose, cleaned and sanitized, ATP passed, returned to service at 10:50.

resolved.title: S3 MM4 sealing empty pouches
resolved.summary: MM4 creating sealed pouches without product inside due to cam timing issue.
resolved.resolution: Updated cam settings at 10:59 — product no longer dropping when pouch doesn't open.

resolved.title: S3 checkweigher reject bins full, product passing
resolved.summary: MM3 and MM4 checkweigher reject bins full; overweight and underweight product passing through uncaught.
resolved.resolution: Line paused at 12:00 for CIL on MMs, bins cleared, running by 12:25.

resolved.title: S3 MM3 infeed drive belts stuck
resolved.summary: Infeed drive belts not moving; forks that pick up pouches were stuck in position.
resolved.resolution: Maintenance freed stuck forks at 14:15 — working properly.

resolved.title: S3 jar belt scraper vibration
resolved.summary: Noise started on jar belt; large roller had chocolate buildup causing scraper to vibrate.
resolved.resolution: Stopped to clean roller at 06:42, line back to run at 07:03.

resolved.title: S4 wrap roll defect
resolved.summary: 24.15 lbs of wrap placed on hold due to improper winding causing machine issues.

resolved.title: FFS scale error and knife cleaning
resolved.summary: Line down for scale error fault and knife maintenance.

resolved.title: ML2 FW door fault and sealing failure
resolved.summary: Flow-wrapper door kept faulting out and film not sealing; print image option disappeared from HMI.
resolved.resolution: Maintenance performed multiple hard resets; door reset, print image option returned, film sealing properly by 06:32.

resolved.title: ML2 depositor stopped for cleaning
resolved.summary: Brief production stop to clean the depositor.

resolved.title: ML2 CIL pause
resolved.summary: Scheduled line stop for change-in-line inspection.
resolved.resolution: CIL completed, line working again at 16:52.

resolved.title: FFS fire alarm
resolved.resolution: No fire — false alarm. Line back up at 05:13, fire drill successful per Ben.

resolved.title: FFS lot changeover 63H to 63G
resolved.resolution: Changeover completed, line back up at 05:37.

resolved.title: ML1 temper out of range
resolved.summary: Temper dropped to 0.9 at 04:14, line paused to retake temper reading and adjust.
resolved.resolution: Adjusted crystallization by 0.1 (80.1 to 80.0) at 04:05, temper recovered to 0.5 by 04:45 — line resumed.

resolved.title: MFM changeover delay
resolved.summary: Changeover delayed waiting on materials from warehouse and level 2 clean requested by QA.
resolved.resolution: Changeover ready at 08:40, line started at 09:15.

needs_attention.title: ML3 operator error — chocolate-only pieces produced
needs_attention.summary: Operator purged chocolate and turned off caramel pistons but forgot to re-enable them at startup, producing chocolate shells without caramel filling.
needs_attention.status: Cooler full of chocolate-only trays at 06:06 causing late start; Alan requested operator follow-up and RCA at 06:21.

needs_attention.title: ML3 out of caramel
needs_attention.summary: Line ran out of caramel with tank just under half full.
needs_attention.status: Reported at 06:48; no further updates in the window.

needs_attention.title: Truffle line missing WIP for Cute Cavanna
needs_attention.summary: Line could not start because WIP pallets for Cute Cavanna flow-wrapper are missing; teams searched all trailers and dock overnight.
needs_attention.status: Still searching as of 04:55; Alan verified all trailers on dock at 01:01 with no WIP found.
